local_page_title: Local Attractions | Sunday Hotel Frankfurt Airport
local_meta_description: Explore local attractions near Sunday Hotel Frankfurt Airport, including Frankfurt city centre, Römer, Museumsufer, Palmengarten, Frankfurt Airport, Mainz, Wiesbaden and Heidelberg.
local_desc: Explore Frankfurt, Neu-Isenburg and the Rhein-Main region
local_overview_desc: Neu-Isenburg is located only 15 minutes from Frankfurt Airport and the city centre, making Sunday Hotel Frankfurt Airport ideal for leisure guests as well as business travellers. Discover Frankfurt’s historic landmarks, museums, shopping areas, parks and nearby regional highlights.
roemer_desc: Frankfurt’s historic square and one of the city’s most recognisable landmarks.
museumsufer_desc: Frankfurt’s famous museum district along the river Main, ideal for art, culture and history lovers.
city_centre_desc: Discover cosmopolitan shops, restaurants, skyline views and the energy of central Frankfurt.
main_tower_desc: Enjoy panoramic views from one of Frankfurt’s most famous skyscrapers.
palmengarten_desc: A peaceful botanical garden with beautiful landscapes, greenhouses and seasonal displays.
alte_oper_desc: Frankfurt’s elegant concert hall and a cultural highlight in the city centre.
goethe_house_desc: Visit the birthplace of Johann Wolfgang von Goethe and explore Frankfurt’s literary heritage.
airport_desc: One of Europe’s major international airports, easily accessible from the hotel.
mainz_desc: Discover Mainz with its historic old town, cathedral and Gutenberg Museum.
wiesbaden_desc: Visit Wiesbaden, famous for its elegant architecture, thermal springs and casino.
heidelberg_desc: A romantic historic city with a famous castle, old town and riverside scenery.
golf_desc: A popular nearby golf destination for guests looking to relax outdoors.
local_cta_desc: Enjoy airport convenience, city access and regional discoveries from Sunday Hotel Frankfurt Airport.
